phrases.text: I don’t want to make a big deal out of this, but ...
phrases.example: I don’t want to make a big deal out of this, but the noise is affecting sleep.
Would you mind lowering the volume after 10?
I completely understand, however it happens quite often.

phrases.text: Maybe we can find a middle ground.
phrases.example: Maybe we can find a middle ground that works for both of us.
What I’m asking is just a bit more quiet late at night.

phrases.text: I appreciate you hearing me out.
phrases.example: I appreciate you hearing me out.

phrases.text: I’m not accusing you of anything.
phrases.example: I’m not accusing you of anything—just sharing the impact.
Could we agree on quiet hours during weekdays?
If that’s difficult, we could message each other first.

phrases.text: Thanks, I really value good neighbor relations.
phrases.example: Thanks, I really value good neighbor relations.
